---
agent: instructuions-generator
---

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs. If no information is provided blow, prompt the user to give the neccessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standartds to document.
